description.content: Dataset discovery via the DCAT-compliant catalog

item.name: Get Census Data API Discovery Catalog

request.name: Get Census Data API Discovery Catalog

description.content:
Returns the DCAT-compliant Census Data API discovery catalog listing
every available dataset. Each entry includes `c_vintage`, `c_dataset`,
`c_geographyLink`, `c_variablesLink`, `c_groupsLink`, and a `distribution`
accessURL pointing to the dataset endpoint.

response.name: DCAT catalog of all Census Data API datasets

description.content: American Community Survey datasets (1-Year, Supplemental, 5-Year)

Query American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates detailed tables for a
given vintage (2009 through the latest release year). Returns variables
for the specified geographies.

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated list of variables to retrieve. Use the group prefix `group(B19013)` to fetch every variable in a table.
Geography clause indicating the geographic level being queried (for example `state:*` or `county:001`).
Hierarchical filter for nested geographies (for example `state:06`).
Universal Census Geographic Identifier — alternate single-parameter geography selector.
(Required) Free API key obtained at https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html

variable.description: (Required) Year (or year+month combination) identifying the dataset vintage. Example values include `2024`, `2023`, `2020`.

response.name: ACS 5-Year detailed tables result set (header row + value rows)

variable.description: (Required) Year (or year+month combination) identifying the dataset vintage. Example values include `2024`, `2023`, `2020`.

response.name: Malformed query — for example a missing required parameter, unknown variable, or invalid geography clause.

variable.description: (Required) Year (or year+month combination) identifying the dataset vintage. Example values include `2024`, `2023`, `2020`.

response.name: Dataset, vintage, or variable not found.

variable.description: (Required) Year (or year+month combination) identifying the dataset vintage. Example values include `2024`, `2023`, `2020`.

description.content:
The Census Data API provides programmatic access to over 1,700 datasets
published by the U.S. Census Bureau including the American Community Survey
(ACS), Decennial Census, Economic Census, Population Estimates, County
Business Patterns, Nonemployer Statistics, Annual Business Survey, and
Household Pulse Survey.

All endpoints follow the pattern `/data/{vintage}/{dataset-path}` and return
a two-dimensional JSON array where the first row is the variable header and
each subsequent row is a record. Every query requires a free `key` query
parameter obtained from https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html.

Responses are released into the public domain under Creative Commons Zero
(CC0). Applications must display: "This product uses the Census Bureau Data
API but is not endorsed or certified by the Census Bureau."


Contact Support:
 Name: Census Bureau Developer Support
 Email: cnmp.developers.list@census.gov
